input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Super Bowl odds/predictions
with open('articles/2026/02/01/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()
        if 'super bowl' in title and ('prediction' in title or 'odds' in title or 'pick' in title or 'preview' in title or 'winner' in title or 'seahawks' in title or 'patriots' in title):
            print(a.get('title','')[:160])
            # Find odds
            for kw in ['odds', 'favorite', 'favouri', 'spread', 'underdog']:
                idx = content.find(kw)
                if idx >= 0:
                    print(f'  [{kw}]: ...{content[max(0,idx-50):idx+200]}...')
                    break
            print('---')
" | head -15
